playbook.intent: Spec-ready stories from grooming become SDD feature folders: spec.md + design.md (where needed) + implementation-plan.md broken into TASK_*.md files. Capacity decided from team velocity and complexity tags. No time estimates — token/complexity only.
playbook.scope: Spec-ready stories from grooming become SDD feature folders: spec.md + design.md (where needed) + implementation-plan.md broken into TASK_*.md files. Capacity decided from team velocity and complexity tags. No time estimates — token/complexity only.

success-criteria.criterion: All 4 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Pick the Sprint Goal
stage.intent: One outcome the sprint exists for.

tasks.task: PM proposes 1-2 sprint goal candidates tied to quarterly outcomes
Team votes on the goal that fits capacity
Write the goal and the success signal

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one written goal is agreed.

stage.name: Expand Tasks (SDD)
stage.intent: Each story becomes a self-contained task file.

tasks.task: Pull ready stories from the backlog
Expand each story into SDD task files in tasks/todo/
Verify each task has spec links, AC, and complexity

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every selected story has materialized as task files.

stage.name: Commit Capacity
stage.intent: Match scope to people, not hope.

tasks.task: Cut the bottom of the list until it fits

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when committed scope ≤ capacity.

stage.name: Kickoff

tasks.task: Hold the planning close-out with the committed list
Set the demo and retro dates

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written, owned sprint backlog.
